items.raw_desc:
Evőeszköztartó állvány Verk 24220 kétrészes evőeszköz állvány, sárga:
	

	
	
	
	Stojan na příbory Verk 24220 vám pomůže s organizací kuchyňské linky. Tento dvoukomorový stojan na příbory nabízí dvě oddělené přihrádky, které umožňují přehledně roztřídit lžíce, vidličky a nože. Je vyroben z plastu a jeho vnitřní vložka je vyjímatelná, což výrazně usnadňuje čištění a vylévání nahromaděné vody. Díky volně stojícímu provedení ho můžete umístit kamkoliv na pracovní desku.

items.desc: Utánfutó kiegészítő MULTIPA 161/251 ráfutófék porvédő:Rubber cap, dust cap for AL-KO type 161/251 ramp brakes. The rubber sleeve is designed to protect the pulling tube of the AL-KO 161S and 251S ramp brake from weather…
items.raw_desc: Utánfutó kiegészítő MULTIPA 161/251 ráfutófék porvédő:Rubber cap, dust cap for AL-KO type 161/251 ramp brakes. The rubber sleeve is designed to protect the pulling tube of the AL-KO 161S and 251S ramp brake from weather and dirt. We recommend replacing a cracked or otherwise damaged cuff as soon as possible. Otherwise, a rusted or dirty towing tube will quickly damage the ramp brake bushings. The rear circular hole of the cuff is fitted with a protrusion on the inside for inserting the cuff into the groove of the ramp brake sleeve (the diameter of the sleeve inside the groove is 60 mm). The front part of the cuff is specially shaped to surround the ball coupling mounted on the towing tube. There are two tabs on the side of the cuff designed to thread the cuff over the head and nut of the rear coupling bolt. The total length of the cuff in the extended working position on the ramp brake is approx. 12.5 cm. Dimensions:  56 mm (diameter 1) x 60 mm (diameter 2) x 125 mm ( length )

items.desc: Cink GreenFood Nutrition Cink-kelát, 90 kapszula:GreenFood Nutrition Zinc Chelate90 + 20 capsulesZinc bisglycinate is a chelated form of the mineral zinc, where zinc is bound to two molecules of the amino acid glycine. …
items.raw_desc: Cink GreenFood Nutrition Cink-kelát, 90 kapszula:GreenFood Nutrition Zinc Chelate90 + 20 capsulesZinc bisglycinate is a chelated form of the mineral zinc, where zinc is bound to two molecules of the amino acid glycine. This form of chelate is designed to improve the absorption and bioavailability of zinc in the body. Chelation is the process by which a mineral is bound to an organic molecule, allowing for better transport and utilization of that mineral in the body. By being bound to two glycine molecules, zinc forms a stable chelate complex. This structure protects zinc from interactions with other substances in the digestive tract that could reduce its absorption.  It is a popular choice for zinc supplementation precisely because of its high absorption and gentleness to the stomach. Zinc bisglycinate is most commonly available in dietary supplements in the form of capsules to ensure accurate dosing.
